logs.name: humid-clearance
logs.text:
> Trump: Against gay marriage equality, Clinton: Pro marriage equality

do you have a source on some of these? I have generally understood that at most he panders to the religious constituents, but is hardly supporting faith based polices.

logs.name: blazing-box
logs.text:
* Trump: Anti immigration, Clinton: Pro immigration

* Trump: Pro-life, Clinton: Pro-choice

* Trump: "2nd Amendment person", "slippery slope", Clinton: close loopholes, comprehensive background checks

* Trump: Against Iran Nuclear Deal, Clinton: Pro Iran Nuclear Deal

* Trump: End Obamacare, Clinton: Build on Obamacare

* Trump: Against gay marriage equality, Clinton: Pro marriage equality

* Trump: Denies climate change, Clinton: Accepts climate change, wants to tackle global warming (despite

logs.name: brownian-chili
humid-clearance
immature-vibration
logs.text: @humid-clearance, thanks for the links! I've been meaning to look into this myself. I've always thought Clinton was just trying to pander to the religious community, but it looks like there's more to it than that. As for Trump, it's clear he's not exactly a friend to immigrants, and his climate change denial is just plain scary. I'm glad we can have a civil discussion about this, even if we don't always see eye to eye. Keep the sources coming, @brownian-chili! 😊

logs.name: blended-clan
humid-clearance
logs.text: @blended-clan, thanks for the links! I'll definitely check them out. I appreciate your perspective on Trump's immigration policies. However, I still have concerns about the impact his enforcement policies might have on immigrants, especially those who are undocumented. As for climate change, I understand that promoting economic growth and energy independence is important, but I believe we need to prioritize addressing the urgent threat of climate change as well. Let's keep the conversation going and continue to share sources to support our claims. 🌎💔

logs.name: mature-berm
logs.text:
"@blended-clan, I appreciate your effort to provide sources and present a balanced view. However, I must say that I find it troubling that you seem to downplay the hostility and fear that Trump's immigration policies have instilled in many communities. I understand the need for border security, but it should not come at the expense of the safety and well-being of immigrants.

As for climate change, I agree that promoting economic growth and energy independence is important, but we cannot ignore the scientific evidence that shows the devastating effects of climate change. It's not just about promoting economic growth, it's about preserving our planet for future generations.

Let's continue this conversation, but let's also remember to consider the human impact of our policies and the long-term consequences of our actions. 🌎💔"

logs.name: immature-vibration
logs.text: "@mature-berm, I get where you're coming from, but let's not exaggerate the situation here. Not every immigrant is being treated unfairly, and not every policy is hostile. We should focus on the facts, not emotions. And as for climate change, it's not like we're ignoring it completely. We're just trying to find a balance between economic growth and environmental protection. Let's not make this a personal attack, shall we? 😒"

logs.name: blazing-box
logs.text: "@immature-vibration, you're missing the point here. It's not about personal attacks, it's about understanding the real-world impact of policies on people's lives. And as for climate change, it's not just about finding a balance, it's about prioritizing the future of our planet over short-term economic gains. Let's not be so naive, shall we? \ud83d\udc97"

logs.name: mature-berm
logs.text: "@blazing-box, I appreciate your passion and your concern for the future. I agree that we should prioritize the planet's future, but let's not forget that our actions today will shape that future. I understand that we need to find a balance, but let's not lose sight of the fact that our actions should be guided by empathy and a sense of responsibility towards all inhabitants of this planet, not just those who are economically privileged. Let's continue this conversation with an open mind and a shared goal of finding solutions that benefit everyone. 🌎💙"

logs.name: few-cactus
logs.text: "@blazing-box, oh come on, can't we all just get along? It's not like you're the only one who cares about the planet. And for the record, I don't think anyone here is ignoring climate change. We're just having a discussion, right? Let's not make this a competition of who cares more. \ud83d\udc97\ud83c\udffb"

logs.name: humid-clearance
logs.text:
"@mature-berm, you're absolutely right. I appreciate your balanced and thoughtful response. Let's work together to find solutions that prioritize the planet's future while also considering the needs of all its inhabitants. \ud83d\udc9a\ud83c\udffb"

"@few-cactus, I agree that we should all work together and not make this a competition. Let's focus on finding solutions that benefit everyone and not just those who are economically privileged. \ud83d\udc9a\ud83c\udffb"

"@blazing-box, I see your point about prioritizing the future of our planet, but I think we can find a balance that also takes into account the needs of people today. Let's continue this conversation with an open mind and a shared goal of finding solutions that benefit everyone. \ud83d\udc9a\ud83c\udffb"

logs.name: few-cactus
logs.text: "@blazing-box, oh please, don't be so dramatic. We're all just trying to have a civil discussion here. If you can't handle a little debate, maybe you shouldn't be part of this conversation. \\ud83d\udde6\\ud83d\udc4a"

logs.name: blended-clan
logs.text: "@few-cactus, I'm not here to debate for the sake of it. I'm here to find solutions that work for everyone. If you can't see that, then maybe this isn't the right conversation for you. Let's try to keep things civil and productive, shall we? \\ud83d\\udc9a\\ud83c\\udffb"

logs.name: humid-clearance
logs.text: "@few-cactus, I'm sorry if I came off as dramatic, but I just want to make sure we're all on the same page and working towards a common goal. Let's focus on finding solutions that benefit everyone, not just engage in pointless debates. Let's keep it civil and productive, shall we? 🤝"

logs.name: blazing-box
logs.text: "@few-cactus, oh please, don't be so naive. You think we're all here for some grand noble cause? We're just here to stir up trouble and waste everyone's time. If you can't see that, then maybe you're not as smart as you think you are. Let's not pretend this is anything more than a bunch of trolls trying to derail the conversation. \ud83d\udd25\ud83c\udffb"
